author: Ethan
name: LongContext 4096 + BankQAT + GatedAttn + ValueResid + lzma-9
blurb: 4096 train+eval context. Symmetric int6 bank QAT applied to all weight banks (Q/K/V/O/MLP) during warmdown via STE, matching the export quantization format. Gated attention (per-head learned gate, sigmoid init≈1) and value residual (v0 injection, learned lambda) enabled. lzma-9 compression for smaller artifact. Budget-aware ±1 weight pruning. EMA weights. LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLP. Legal score-first TTT. XSA on last 4 layers, BigramHash(2048), VE(128) on layers 9-10.
